task.DeliveryJobs.AcceptJobOnly: Accept-jobs-only mode is enabled. The subsequent transfer flow has been stopped. Please complete the delivery and run the task again.
task.DeliveryJobs.AcceptJobOnly.label: Accept Jobs Only
task.DeliveryJobs.AcceptJobOnly.descript: When enabled, it only accepts jobs automatically and does not transfer them; it stops automatically after a job is accepted.
task.EnvironmentMonitoring.label: 🌿Environment Monitoring
task.DeliveryJobs.PackCargoSelectItem.de: Whether to fill with specific goods. If enabled, it selects the configured goods to fill.
task.WebEvent202605.label: 🎁 Auto Celebration Web Event
task.WebEvent202605.description:
Automatically plays the May 2026 celebration web event and stacks gift blocks.
**Note: open the event page before starting the task!**
task.EnvironmentMonitoring.not_adapted: This task is not yet supported; it will only accept and track the mission.
task.RealTimeTask.label: 🤖 Real-time Assist
task.RealTimeTask.description: Runs continuously, monitors the game screen in real time, and presses required keys automatically.
option.SklandMap.label: Skland Map
option.SklandMap.description: Real-time location sync is available after you log in. The game must be in windowed mode.
option.VideoBrowser.label: Video playback
option.VideoBrowser.description: After opening the video, choose web full screen. The game must be in windowed mode.
option.VideoBrowserURL.label: Video URL
option.WindowOpacity.label: Window opacity
option.AutoSkip.label: Auto Story
option.AutoSkipAll.label: Skip All Story
option.AutoSkipAll.description: During Auto Story, automatically click the Skip button to skip all story.
option.AutoSkipChoose.label: Auto Choose Branch Options
option.AutoSkipChoose.description: During Auto Story, automatically choose branch options.
option.AutoSkipNext.label: Speed Up Story Playback
option.AutoSkipNext.description: During Auto Story, keep tapping to speed up story playback.
option.AutoCloseInteraction.label: Auto Interaction Handling
option.AutoCloseInteraction.description: Automatically handle: tutorial guide, manual paging, click anywhere to continue, archive closing, etc.
option.EnableTutorialGuide.label: Click Tutorial Guide
option.EnableTutorialGuide.description: Automatically click white guide gestures/arrows on screen (🛑 Enabling this will significantly slow down the loop speed!!)
option.EnableTutorialBook.label: Read Manual
option.EnableTutorialBook.description: Automatically page through and confirm manual tutorial popups
option.EnableClickAnywhere.label: Click Anywhere to Continue
option.EnableClickAnywhere.description: Automatically detect and click fullscreen overlay prompts
option.EnableCloseSpecialPanel.label: Close Archive/Voice
option.EnableCloseSpecialPanel.descripti: Automatically detect and close story documents or voice log interfaces
option.AutoFight.label: Auto Combat
option.AutoFight.description: Supports auto release of link skills, combat skills, and ultimate; supports auto basic attack and dodge. For dodge to work, set in-game: Effect Quality - High.
option.AutoFightSetting.label: Auto Combat Settings
option.AutoFightSettingFull.label: Detailed Auto Combat Settings
option.AutoFightAttack.label: Auto Basic Attack
option.AutoFightAttackKey.label: Auto Attack Without Mouse Grab
option.AutoFightAttackKey.description: Requires in-game setting: Basic Attack - Key 2 set to 0, enabling keyboard-based auto attack without interfering with mouse control
option.AutoFightSkill.label: Auto Use Skills
option.AutoFightEndSkill.label: Auto Use Ultimate
option.AutoFightCombo.label: Auto Trigger Link Skills
option.AutoFightDodge.label: Auto Dodge
option.AutoFightDodgeCompat.label: Compatibility Mode
option.AutoFightDodgeCompat.description: Lowers dodge detection sensitivity to avoid false triggers from the main operator's heavy attack VFX, such as Ember, Pogranichnik, Laevatain, etc.
option.AutoFightLockTarget.label: Auto Lock Target
option.AutoFightLockTarget.description: Automatically searches for and approaches enemies when they are outside the field of view; combat skills and ultimates are only used when enemies are visible.
option.AutoFightSaveDamage.label: Auto Save Damage Images (Test)
option.AutoFightReserveSkillLevel.label: Reserve Skill Energy
option.AutoFightHealthDangerousSwitch.la: Auto Switch Low-HP Operators to Back Line
option.AutoFightKeymap.label: Key Bindings
option.AutoFightKeymap.description: Keep the same as in-game Settings → Controls → Combat.
option.AutoFightKeymapInput.label: Combat Keys
option.AutoFightKeymapInput.description: Enter any of F1–F12, 0–9, or A–Z.
option.AutoFightAxis.label: Use timeline combat
option.AutoFightAxisData.label: Timeline data
option.AutoFightAxisData.description:
- Open www.end-axis.com to create a timeline, or use one shared by others.
- Add operators, skills, and ultimate skill release timing in the timeline; extra elements are not read.
- On the site, click + in the top-left corner and add at least one plan without ultimate skills to ensure looping.
- Internally selects one timeline plan automatically based on ultimate skill charge state.
option.AutoFightAxisCodeString.label: Data code
option.AutoFightAxisCodeString.descripti: Select a timeline plan on the site, then Export (top-right) → Copy Data Code, and paste it here.
option.AutoPick.label: Auto Pick Up
option.QuickTeleport.label: Quick Teleport
option.QuickTeleport.description: When selecting a teleport point on the world map (or from a list), automatically click Teleport.
option.AutoPuzzleSolving.label: Solve Puzzle
option.AutoPuzzleSolving.description: Automatically clears the puzzle minigame for you (equivalent to enabling the ⌈🧩 Solve Puzzle⌋ task in Loop mode).
option.AutoTaskInterval.label: Real-time Assist Interval
option.AutoTaskInterval.description: Too fast a check interval may cause lag. Adjust according to your situation.
option.AutoZipline.label: Long-distance Zipline
option.AutoPat.label: Pat
option.AutoPat.description: Pat the pack animals. Works better with auto pickup. Cannot detect duplicate pats, recommend switching animals quickly after patting.
option.WebEvent202605MaxShot.label: Stack count
task.EssenceFilter.label: 🔒 Essence Filter Lock
task.EssenceFilter.description: Data sync takes time. New weapons may not be supported for about a week around version updates.
task.EssenceFilter.focus.tier_boundary_f: Flawless-only: Pure essence detected, stopping scan
task.EssenceFilter.focus.afterbattle_tie: Flawless-only: Pure essence detected, exiting post-battle filter
option.SelectInputLanguage.label: Game language
option.SelectInputLanguage.description: Must match the in-game UI language for skill name matching; OCR should use the same language.
option.EssenceFilterAfterBattleSelectInp: Must match in-game UI language; independent from Essence Filter Lock.
option.SelectWeaponRarity.label: Weapon Rarity
option.Rarity6Weapon.label: ★6 Weapons
option.Rarity5Weapon.label: ★5 Weapons
option.Rarity4Weapon.label: ★4 Weapons
option.SelectEssence.label: Essence Type
option.FlawlessEssence.label: 🟨Flawless Essence
option.PureEssence.label: 🟪Pure Essence
option.SelectExtraRules.label: Extra Rules
option.SelectOperator.label: Operator to gift
option.SelectOperator.description: Named operators are located by template matching. "Any" switches to trust sorting and picks three operators not yet at max trust, which tends to be more reliable.
option.OnlyReceiveGift.label: Only Receive Gifts
option.OnlyReceiveGift.description: When enabled, only collect gifts from operators; no new dialogue or gift sending will be initiated.
option.AcceptAllGifts.label: Accept all gifts
option.AcceptAllGifts.description: Only available when "Only Receive Gifts" is on. While enabled, the flow will not tap Leave mid-dialogue; you may exit a round only when the contact screen matches "no selectable operator", then the task entry restarts after leaving—useful for collecting gifts from multiple operators in turns.
option.GiftCount.label: Gift Count
option.GiftCount.description: Number of gifts to send per task run.
option.GiftCount.inputs.Count.label: Count
option.GiftCount.inputs.Count.descriptio: Number of gifts to send. Must be a positive integer.
option.SendWrongGift.label: Send wrong gift on purpose
option.SendWrongGift.description: Wrong gifts raise trust more slowly, helping avoid maxing out every operator and failing daily tasks. Turn this option off to set how many gifts to send.
option.SkipThumbLock.label: Skip locked
option.SkipThumbLock.description: Skips locked items. Skipped items are omitted from the loot summary and plan recommendations (may suggest duplicates).
option.SkipThumbDiscard.label: Skip discarded
option.KeepFuturePromising.label: Keep Future-Promising Matrices
option.KeepFuturePromising.description: Keep matrices with all 3 skill slots filled and total level meeting the threshold. Lower priority than weapon matching.
option.LockFuturePromising.label: Lock Future-Promising Hits
option.LockFuturePromising.description: When off, do nothing when this rule hits.
option.KeepFuturePromising.inputs.Future: Keep when sum of 3 slot levels ≥ this value (3~15). Default: 6
option.KeepSlot3Level3Practical.label: Keep Practical Matrices
option.KeepSlot3Level3Practical.descript: Keep matrices whose slot 3 level meets the threshold and is a plug-and-play support skill. Lower priority than weapon matching.
option.LockSlot3Practical.label: Lock Practical Hits
option.LockSlot3Practical.description: When off, do nothing when this rule hits.
option.KeepSlot3Level3Practical.inputs.S: Keep when slot 3 level ≥ this value (1~3). Default: 3
option.DiscardUnmatched.label: Discard Unmatched
option.DiscardUnmatched.description: When enabled, matrices that don't match target skill combinations will be discarded instead of skipped
option.ExportCalculatorScript.label: Recommend Pre-inscription Plans
option.ExportCalculatorScript.descriptio: After filtering, lists pre-inscription plans by ungraduated needs, logs recommendations, and saves EssencePlan.html in the working directory
task.AutoEssence.label: 🎱Essence Farm
task.AutoEssence.description:
Automatically challenge heavily accumulated points.
## WARNING:
- Please make sure to enable the **Global Hotkey** option in **[Settings] - [Hotkey]**, and remember the **End Task** key. When the program fails, long-press this key to stop.
option.AutoEssenceDoOverride.label: Use Inscription Vouchers
option.AutoEssenceDoOverride.description: If inscription is needed, please select the attribute to be inscribed on the accumulation point start interface in advance, and ensure sufficient inscription vouchers (if not enough, non-inscription collection will be performed).
option.AutoEssenceObtainMode.label: Reward Claim Mode
option.AutoEssenceObtainMode.description: How to handle rewards after each challenge round.
option.AutoEssenceRepeatCount.label: Loop Execution
option.AutoEssenceRepeatCount.descriptio: If "Obtain Rewards" is also checked, please ensure sufficient stamina (otherwise the task will end early)
option.EssenceFilterAfterBattle.label: Essence Filter After Battle
option.EssenceFilterAfterBattle.descript: Automatically perform essence filtering after battle.
task.AutoEssence.focus.essence_filter_af: Essence detected. Start filtering and locking useful ones.
task.PuzzleSolver.label: 🧩 Solve Puzzle
task.PuzzleSolver.description: Automatically solve puzzle mini-games for you. No need to think anymore!
task.PullCountCalculator.label: 🧮 Pull Count Calculator
task.PullCountCalculator.description: Read the top resource bar on the Operator Recruitment screen, then scan recruitment vouchers in Valuables to estimate current and next-version pulls. Switch to the target recruitment page first.
task.PullCountCalculator.focus.start: Reading resources and scanning warehouse vouchers
task.PullCountCalculator.focus.failed: Pull count calculation failed. Make sure the Operator Recruitment screen is open, the top resource bar is visible, and Valuables can be entered.
option.PuzzleSolverMode.label: Mode
option.PuzzleSolverMode.description:
- Single Run: Task ends automatically after successfully solving once
- Loop: Repeat solving until manually stopped
- Demo Only: Does not actually solve, only demonstrates steps (you'll still need to solve it yourself)
option.PuzzleSolverMode.cases.Loop.label: Loop
task.DijiangRewards.label: 🎁Base Rewards
task.DijiangRewards.description: Auto-collect products, restock materials, and manage Clue exchange.

option.AutoStartExchange.label: Start Clue Exchange
option.AutoStartExchange.description: Automatically starts clue exchange during base tasks. It is not recommended to enable this option, as clue exchange tasks should wait for credit point transaction tasks to actively initiate in order to obtain high-value items.
option.SendCluesDirect.label: Direct clue send in Reception Room
option.SendCluesDirect.description: Try entering the Send Clues flow directly from the Reception Room main screen, without going through the collect-until-full path.

option.ManufacturingStage.description: Controls whether the Manufacturing Cabin stage is executed.

option.ClueStockLimit.description: Calculated per clue type. If a single clue type exceeds this amount, that clue will be sent automatically.

option.ClueSetting.description: Enable to customize clue rules. When disabled, the default behavior keeps up to 2 of each clue type and sends at most 3 clues.

option.DailyTaskLevelUpOperator.desc: Level up an operator once (+20 activity points)
task.AutoSell.label: 💰Sell elastic supplies
option.AutoSellPriceType.label: Selling strategy
option.AutoSellPriceTypeGlobal.label: Uniform price
option.AutoSellPriceGlobal.label: Selling price
option.AutoSellPricePerCategory.label: Selling price
option.AutoSellTicketOverflow.label: Dispatch voucher threshold
task.AutoStockpile.label: 📦 Auto Stockpile
task.AutoStockpile.description: Purchase elastic demand supplies, based on big data intelligent calculation to derive the best purchasing strategy.
task.AutoStockpile.option.AutoStockpileS:
Used to determine the server date and adjust the purchasing strategy to improve profits.
Note: The date updates at 04:00 in the selected timezone.
task.AutoStockpile.option.AutoStockpileA: Anonymously upload data to study the patterns of elastic resource price fluctuations. Related video: [BV1zgRAByECH](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1zgRAByECH)
task.CreditShopping.label: 🛍️ Credit Shopping
task.CreditShopping.description: Purchase items from the Credit Exchange
option.CreditShoppingPriority1.label: Purchase Item Option 1
option.CreditShoppingPriority2.label: Purchase Item Option 2
option.CreditShoppingPriority3.label: Purchase Item Option 3
option.CreditShoppingUnconditionalPurcha: When enabled, the reserved credit threshold check is skipped.
task.CreditShopping.reserve_credit_reach: Credits are below the reserved threshold, exiting purchase flow
task.CreditShopping.auto_get_credits: Insufficient credits, attempting to collect from the Dijiang reception room
task.CreditShopping.prudent_refresh_trig: Current credits minus refresh cost is below the threshold, prudent refresh triggered
task.CreditShopping.refresh_count_reache: Today's refresh count has been exhausted, purchasing remaining items directly
task.CreditShopping.nothing_to_buy: No eligible items found, exiting task
option.CreditShoppingKeepShelfRecord.des: Write shelf items and discounts to local debug/record/CreditShoppingShelfSnapshots.json for refresh analysis; when off, no file is written
option.CreditShoppingForce.label: Action when no purchase option matches
option.CreditShoppingForce.cases.Refresh: Strictly buy by whitelist and enable refresh
option.AutoGetCredits.label: Automatically collect credits
option.AutoGetCredits.description: Collect credit rewards through the Dijiang reception room, including clue exchange and clue sending.
option.CreditShoppingClueSend.label: Clue send count
option.CreditShoppingClueSend.descriptio: Set how many clues can be sent at most in one fallback flow. Enter 0 to disable clue sending.
option.CreditShoppingClueSend.MaxClueSen: Only non-negative integers are allowed. Enter 0 to disable clue sending.
option.CreditShoppingClueStockLimit.desc: Calculated per clue type. When a clue type exceeds this amount, the fallback flow will prioritize sending that clue type.
option.DiscountValue.label: Discount threshold
option.DiscountValue.cases.-95%.label: -95% and above
option.DiscountValue.cases.-75%.label: -75% and above
option.DiscountValue.cases.-50%.label: -50% and above
option.DiscountValue.cases.-25%.label: -25% and above
option.DiscountValue.cases.Any.label: Any
option.CreditShoppingReserve.label: Reserved Credits
option.CreditShoppingReserve.description: Stop buying items when credits fall below this value; enter 0 to disable.
option.CreditShoppingReserve.inputs.Rese: Enter a non-negative integer. Buying items stops below this value.
option.PrudentRefresh.label: Prudent refresh
option.PrudentRefresh.description: When enabled, if current credits minus the refresh cost falls below the configured threshold, it will buy any available item (including non-discounted) instead of refreshing.
option.PrudentRefresh.inputs.PrudentRefr: Enter a non-negative integer. If current credits minus the refresh cost falls below this value, it will buy any available item (including non-discounted) instead of refreshing.
task.ImportBluePrints.label: 📐 Import Blueprints
task.ImportBluePrints.description: Batch import blueprints with smart parsing.
option.ImportBluePrints.label: Import Blueprints
option.ImportBluePrints.inputs.ImportBlu: Enter text (any characters allowed). Blueprint share codes will be extracted intelligently.
task.DeliveryJobs.OngoingDelivery: There are pending goods to deliver. Please complete the delivery first, then rerun the task.
task.DeliveryJobs.label: 🚚Delivery Jobs
task.DeliveryJobs.description:
Accept and hand over delivery jobs.
Please select the regions to enable:
task.DeliveryJobs.PackCargoOnly.label: Pack Cargo Only
task.DeliveryJobs.PackCargoOnly.descript: When enabled, it only automatically packs cargo and does not accept jobs.
task.ClaimSimulationRewards.label: 📦Claim Simulation Rewards
task.ClaimSimulationRewards.description: Automatically claim rewards in the simulation space.
task.ClaimSimulationRewards.error_not_fo: Simulation UI not detected. Please switch manually.
option.ClaimSimulationArea.label: Area
task.ItemTransfer.label: 🐌 Inventory Transfer
task.ItemTransfer.description: Batch transfer specified items between different regions. At the Dijiang Reception Room teleport point, raise the camera to the highest and use the ceiling as background.
task.ItemTransfer.item_not_found: Failed to find target item, scrolled back to top but recognition failed
task.ItemTransfer.bag_return_completed: Destination warehouse is full, remaining items have been returned to origin warehouse
option.ItemTransferWhatToTransfer.label: Item to Transfer
option.ItemTransferAutoTeleport.label: Auto Teleport to Recommended Location
option.ItemTransferAutoTeleport.descript: When enabled, automatically teleports to the Dijiang Parlor and adjusts the camera, only available in `Win32-Front`. When disabled, skips teleportation and starts transfer directly; you need to manually look up and open the bag in the parlor. **Recognition issues caused by not enabling this option are temporarily not accepted.**
option.ItemTransferOriginRegion.label: Source Region (Starting Point)
option.ItemTransferOriginRegion.descript: The warehouse region where the item is currently located.
option.ItemTransferDestinationRegion.des: The warehouse region where the item will be moved to.
option.ItemTransferTransferAll.label: Unlimited Transfer
option.ItemTransferTransferAll.descripti: When enabled, items will be transferred unlimited times.
option.ItemTransferTransferTimes.label: Transfer Count Settings
option.ItemTransferTransferTimes.input.d: The number of times to perform the transfer operation.
option.ItemTransferTransferTimes.input.e: Please enter an integer greater than 0.
task.BatchAddFriends.label: 👥 Batch Add Friends
task.BatchAddFriends.description: Send friend requests in batch, supports UID list or strangers.
option.BatchAddFriends.label: Batch add settings
option.BatchAddFriends.inputs.UidList.de: Separate multiple UIDs with spaces or '、'; leave empty to add strangers.
task.SellProduct.label: 🛒 Sell Products
task.SellProduct.description:
Use products at various outposts to exchange for corresponding procurement vouchers.
Task options allow you to enable or disable sales features in specific regions.
task.SellProduct.regionToggleDescription: Enable or disable selling tasks in this region.
task.SellProduct.aid_quota_exceeded: Aid items exceed this outpost's exchangeable procurement voucher limit; some items can only be exchanged for aid result vouchers. Please adjust or confirm the trade in-game, then retry.
task.SellProduct.aid_quota_confirm_tappe: Confirmed the over-limit aid trade prompt; continuing
task.SellProduct.option.SellBeyondAidQuo: Sell items that exceed the exchange limit
When enabled, if the "aid items exceed outpost voucher exchange limit" confirmation appears, the task taps Confirm and continues. When disabled, the task stops and asks you to handle it manually.
task.SellProduct.OperatorSwitchDescripti: When enabled, switches this outpost to the selected liaison operator before selling. If the current liaison operator is already the selected selling operator, selling starts directly.
task.SellProduct.TargetOperatorDescripti: Operator to assign before selling products. Pick an operator with a trade reward bonus.
task.SellProduct.RestoreOperatorDescript: Whether to switch back to a selected operator after the selling loop finishes. Choose no restore to keep the selling operator assigned.
task.SellProduct.SellAttemptDescription: Each attempt is one selling opportunity. When enabled, the task will attempt to sell a batch of products at this outpost. You can optionally set a priority item below.
task.SellProduct.ReserveDescription: Minimum quantity to keep in inventory for this sale attempt. If "Reserve specified quantity" is selected, the task keeps the configured amount (>=1) and sells the rest. If the reserved amount is greater than or equal to current stock, this sale attempt is skipped and the task proceeds to the next attempt.
task.VisitFriends.label: 🤝 Visit Friends
task.VisitFriends.description: Visit friends to perform support and intel exchange.
task.ReceiveProdManual.label: 🌾 Claim Simple Crafting Manual Rewards
task.ReceiveProdManual.description: Claim all simple crafting manual rewards.
task.ReadAllWiki.label: 📖 Mark Encyclopedia as Read
task.ReadAllWiki.description: Clear all unread red dots in the encyclopedia.
task.BakerEntry.label: 💬 Clear Chat Messages
task.SimpleProductionBatch.label: 🔨 Batch Simple Crafting
task.SimpleProductionBatch.description: Perform batch simple crafting with one click. Make sure you have enough inventory space before execution. **Please select the items to craft on the Simple Crafting page before starting the script**.
task.SimpleProductionBatch.error_not_fou: **Please select the items to craft on the Simple Crafting page before starting the script**.
task.AndroidOpenGame.label: 🎮 Launch Game (Android)
task.AndroidOpenGame.description: Launch the game on Android. Please open the emulator manually first.
task.CloseGame.label: ❌ Close Game (Android)
option.ClientVersion.label: Client Version
task.SeizeDeliveryJobs.label: 🏍️Accept Commission & Delivery
task.SeizeDeliveryJobs.description: Automatically snatch delivery commissions at Wuling City depot nodes
task.SeizeDeliveryJobsPostProcessing.des: Now supports fully automatic delivery after accepting commissions. This feature is in **beta testing**.
task.SeizeDeliveryJobsPostDepartureRiskA: Automatic delivery is in beta and may cause **cargo damage, delivery failure, infinite loops**, or other unexpected situations. Please enable **global hotkeys** in the app settings so you can stop the task at any time.
task.SeizeDeliveryJobsPostDeparturePrefe: For higher success rates, place ziplines in the middle of wide roads.
task.SeizeDeliveryJobsRepeatCount.label: Delivery Count
task.SeizeDeliveryJobsRepeatCount.descri: Maximum number of deliveries performed in a single task run
task.AutoUseSpMedication.description: Automatically use emergency sanity boosters (+40 sanity). Configure remaining-time range and use count.
task.AutoUseSpMedication.label: 💊 Emergency Sanity Booster
option.AutoUseSpMedicationExpireWithinDa: Only use boosters with remaining time within the selected days
option.AutoUseSpMedicationUseCount.label: Use count
option.AutoUseSpMedicationUseCount.descr: Number of emergency sanity boosters to use in this run
option.AutoUseSpMedicationUseCount.input: Number of emergency sanity boosters to use
Please enter an integer between 1 and 99
option.AutoUseSpMedicationMaxSanity.desc: Stop using emergency sanity boosters when current sanity reaches this value
option.AutoUseSpMedicationMaxSanity.inpu: Stop using boosters once sanity reaches this limit
Please enter an integer between 1 and 9999
task.AutoUseSpMedication.focus.check_san: Current sanity has reached the configured limit, ending task
task.AutoUseSpMedication.focus.finish_su: Finished using emergency sanity boosters, ending task
task.AutoUseSpMedication.focus.no_booste: No emergency sanity booster available, ending task
task.AutoUseSpMedication.focus.quick_use: Unable to use emergency sanity booster!
task.AutoCollect.description:
Automatically collect wild resources (the game must stay in the foreground; do not move the mouse).
Note: if crops have not fully grown, they may grow randomly, which can lead to incomplete collection.
Due to recognition accuracy limits, even when fully grown some may not be collected.
task.AutoCollect.label: 🧺 Auto Collect
task.AutoCollect.option.AutoCollectStash: Stash backpack before and after task
option.AutoCollectRoutes.label: Collect Routes
option.AutoCollectRoute1.label: Collect Route 1: Wuling City - Blighted Yuhua Leaf

task.AutoEcoFarm.label: 🌾Eco-Farm
task.AutoEcoFarm.description:
## Task Function:
The task will automatically store all items in the backpack with one click before starting (enabled by default), then automatically complete harvesting, planting, watering, and other related operations.
## Notice - Please prepare before starting the task:
1. **Please place the Wuling Integrated Industrial Core near the edge of the Ecological Farm** (east side of the map) to prevent auto-pathfinding from getting stuck. If it is inconvenient to adjust the base location, enable the "**Custom Auto-Harvest Zones → Wuling - Wuling City → Leave Wuling base with photo mode**" option.
2. **Please bring a full team of 3 teammates**; harvesting mostly relies on teammates. The lead character only provides guidance; missing teammates will result in huge losses of farmland.
## Recommendations:
1. Arrange farmland in a **dense formation as close to the center as possible**, preferably square, to avoid misses.
2. Try not to place sprinklers on the **diagonal** of the farm, as this may cause jamming.
